overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny suburban Los Santos neighborhood. The character crosses streets and sidewalks, passing residential houses, palm trees, utility poles, and occasional vehicles in a bright midday setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban street corner with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: view briefly blocked by wooden utility pole as character passes close by
character steps from sidewalk onto street crosswalk to cross the road
white sports car drives past on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk and crossing the street at a marked crosswalk

white sports car driving along the road past the crosswalk

entered.detail: painted white zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt road
yellow painted fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner
single-story suburban house with tan stucco exterior and brown roof
tall palm tree trunk visible against the sky
black plastic trash bin on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a suburban sidewalk near a crosswalk, passing a woman standing on the corner. The view briefly passes behind a wooden utility pole before the character steps onto the crosswalk to cross the street. A white sports car drives past on the road as the character reaches the other side.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined suburban sidewalk with utility poles and mailboxes

events.description: view briefly blocked by white fence pillar as character passes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past residential properties and street furniture

entered.detail: blue USPS-style mailbox on the sidewalk
ornate black metal street lamp post with concrete base
white wooden picket fence bordering a residential property
two black trash bins lined up on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a quiet suburban sidewalk lined with palm trees and utility poles. A blue mailbox and ornate street lamp are visible as the character passes a white picket fence. The previous crosswalk and fire hydrant recede behind as the character continues down the residential street.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with real estate signage and brick fencing

events.description: passing wooden 'For Sale' sign with red text in front yard
dark sedan drives past on the street in the background

agents.ego_description: walking past suburban homes with real estate signage and brick pillar fencing

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving along the residential street

entered.detail: wooden real estate sign with red text reading 'For Sale' and phone number
red brick pillar fence with black metal railings
second yellow fire hydrant on the grass verge
single-story white house with red tile roof and covered porch

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk past a wooden 'For Sale' sign and brick pillar fencing. A yellow fire hydrant stands on the grass verge while a white house with a red roof appears across the street. A dark sedan drives by in the background as the character passes more residential properties.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential area with large commercial billboard and parked SUV

events.description: approaching driveway with parked black SUV and large billboard structure
view briefly blocked by utility pole as character walks past

agents.ego_description: walking past a driveway with a parked black SUV and a large commercial billboard

entered.detail: large commercial billboard with 'Fame or Shame' text and character image
black SUV parked in a residential driveway
single-story gray house with dark roof and stone facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a gray suburban house and approaches a large 'Fame or Shame' billboard towering above the street. A black SUV is parked in a driveway next to a white house with weathered paint. The character continues along the sidewalk as the previous elements recede behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny suburban neighborhood as the character progresses from a busy street crossing into a quiet residential stretch. It begins on a sidewalk near a crosswalk, passing a pedestrian and a wooden utility pole before crossing the street just as a white sports car drives past. As the character continues, the scene shifts to a peaceful walkway lined with palm trees, a blue mailbox, and white picket fences that gradually replace the initial intersection. The camera then glides past a for-sale sign and brick pillars toward a white house with a red roof, while a dark sedan passes in the background. Finally, the view moves past a gray suburban home and a parked black SUV, culminating in the sight of a towering Fame or Shame billboard looming over the street.
